full_text: Pathirana to Shakib, Caught by Theekshana!! Ohh Maheesh Theekshana has taken an absolute blinder. We've seen him mess up so many times on the field but look at him keep his eyes on this ball that was dying on him and time his jump forward to perfection and the technique to get his hands under the ball before it went to the ground was brilliant. Literally wanted to scoop the ball and controlled it nicely into the palms. Is this going to inspire the Sri Lankans? Sure Pathirana is pumped. Was a short delivery outside off stump, Shakib tried to guide it uppishly to the third man fence but Sri Lanka had their man straighter and got the reward.

full_text: Hasaranga to Towhid Hridoy, Lbw!! Hasaranga gets his revenge but Hridoy might have just put the game in Bangladesh's bag with those three sixes. Bold of Hasaranga to keep it full again. Was the leggie this time, Hridoy did read it, so he went for another slog-sweep, was probably done for extra pace and it skidded on. Impact in line with the stumps. Celebreappeal from Hasaranga but umpire Paul Reiffel said no. Instant review even before the timer came on and he was so confident that was out. It was plumb indeed as ball-tracker said smashing middle of middle stump. Maybe the length was too full for that shot but Hridoy's done a fabulous job.
